name: african dream root
mechanism: Triterpene saponins foam in water and may act as psychoactive agents that stimulate vivid or lucid dreams; saponins also have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, cholesterol-lowering and blood sugar-lowering properties; alkaloids and diterpenoids may contribute to psychoactive effects.
effects: No direct effects data. Contextual inference: Used in ritual

contraindications: Limited safety data; high doses may irritate the digestive tract and cause vomiting
May cause disturbing or confusing dreams at high doses
Children, pregnant and breastfeeding individuals should avoid use
